rationale: Field-shape variant fixture. Axis-5 checked_alloc rule currently matches local-variable assignments only (`local = alloc()`), NOT struct-field assignments (`struct->fld = alloc()`). So variant_ratio counts only the local sites; field sites aren't aggregated. Axis-3 unchecked_alloc (separate rule) still fires on the field assignment via its own field-shape coverage. Tests the axis-5 scoping limit.
